title: selaginella indica
intro: Selaginella indica, also known as Spikemoss or Indian jointfir, is a type of small, evergreen, and perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella indica include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Selaginella indica is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, and it is also dried and used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
